headline.es: Patch 7.2: Yunara llega como nueva ADC. Darius, Kai'Sa, Kayn y Varus suben a SS. Lee Sin cae de SS tras nerf masivo a Tempest. Yasuo destruido — cae a D. Revolución de ítems: Rabadon's +30 AP, Seraph's +25 AP, Botas Tier 3 para todos. Annie sube a S con Tibbers que hereda penetración. K'Sante y Zed caen. Temporada S22 comienza el 10 de julio.
headline.en: Patch 7.2: Yunara arrives as new ADC. Darius, Kai'Sa, Kayn and Varus rise to SS. Lee Sin falls from SS after massive Tempest nerf. Yasuo destroyed — falls to D. Item revolution: Rabadon's +30 AP, Seraph's +25 AP, Tier 3 Boots for all. Annie rises to S with Magic Pen Tibbers. K'Sante and Zed fall. Season S22 begins July 10.

note.es: Yunara (nueva ADC). Darius/Kai'Sa/Kayn/Varus suben a SS. Annie a S. Ryze/Ekko a A. Lee Sin, Zed, Yasuo, K'Sante nerfed. Rabadon's +30 AP, Seraph's +25 AP, Botas Tier 3. Temporada S22.
note.en: Yunara (new ADC). Darius/Kai'Sa/Kayn/Varus rise to SS. Annie to S. Ryze/Ekko to A. Lee Sin, Zed, Yasuo, K'Sante nerfed. Rabadon's +30 AP, Seraph's +25 AP, Tier 3 Boots. Season S22.

note.es: Thresh buffed masivamente (Q, E, W). Skarner, Gnar, Sona, Seraphine buffed. Taliyah, Nautilus, Nunu & Willump nerfed. Chemtech Chainsword +150 HP.
note.en: Thresh massively buffed (Q, E, W). Skarner, Gnar, Sona, Seraphine buffed. Taliyah, Nautilus, Nunu & Willump nerfed. Chemtech Chainsword +150 HP.

note.es: Skarner añadido (jungla/top). Aurora nerfed. Zoe, Diana y Heimerdinger buffed. Infinity Edge y Black Cleaver buffed. Demolish y Castigo Devastador nerfed.
note.en: Skarner added (jungle/top). Aurora nerfed. Zoe, Diana and Heimerdinger buffed. Infinity Edge and Black Cleaver buffed. Demolish and Devastating Smite nerfed.

note.es: Taliyah, K'Sante, Viego, Kog'Maw nerfed. Shen, Kayle, Akshan buffed. Ambessa y Gragas ajustados.
note.en: Taliyah, K'Sante, Viego, Kog'Maw nerfed. Shen, Kayle, Akshan buffed. Ambessa and Gragas adjusted.

note.es: Taliyah añadida. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer y Randuin's Omen ajustados.
note.en: Taliyah added. Garen, Ryze, Twisted Fate nerfed. Kayn, Graves, Bard buffed. Kraken Slayer and Randuin's Omen adjusted.

note.es: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.
note.en: Zeri, Sivir, Tristana buffed. Vayne, Mel, Riven nerfed. Vladimir +Armor.

note.es: Solo cambios de modos (ARAM/Arena). Sin cambios a campeones, items ni runas principales.
note.en: Mode-only changes (ARAM/Arena). No main game champion, item or rune changes.

note.es: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
note.en: Talon, Fizz, Varus, Twitch, Yone buffed. Rammus, Renekton, Swain, Teemo, Amumu nerfed.
